title: Tyre Repair Kit,70pcs Tyre Plug Kit,Heavy Duty Tyre Puncture Repair Kit,Universal Car Tyre Patch Kit with 30 Tyre Repair Rubber Strip for Tires on Cars,Trucks,Motorcycles,ATV,Tractor,Van
features: [High-Quality]:This tyre repair kit is made of high quality steel, with excellent adhesion, flexibility, shock absorption, not easy to age and long shelf life, it can withstand the toughest repairs and achieve the best tyre inflation tightness

[Dureable and Convenint]:Tyre Puncture Repair Kit, a repair kit for tyre repair, includes a hardened steel auger and an insertion needle with a sandblasted finish to increase the durability of tire repair. At the same time, the portable organizer takes up very little space, making it ideal for storing in your car for roadside emergencies

[Very Versatile]:Universal heavy duty tyre plug kit to easily repair all types of tires on cars, trucks, motorcycles, ATVs, tractors, vans, ATVs, lawn mowers, RVs, jeeps and more. TIP: Tire repair kits are designed to work with any tubeless tire, not tubed tires or sidewall punctures
[Complete Kit]:70 Piece Tyre Plug Kit, a complete kit to meet your various tyre repair needs, the kit contains T-handle and spiral probe tool and other accessories and 30 pieces of adhesive strips

[Excellent Service]:Ghguole is committed to providing customers with solid equipment and tools, with attention to detail and quality in design and production. We provide excellent service, if you have any questions, please contact us
description: Product Description 70pcs Tire Repair Kit First aid for a flat tire Ghguole tyre repair kit is used to repair punctured tubeless tyres. It is widely used in the repair of tubeless tire perforation of automobiles, trucks, jeeps, motorcycles, all terrain vehicles, lawn mowers, tractors, trailers, etc. Product list 1 X T-handle Spiral Probe Tool, 1 X T-handle Insert Tool 2 X Spare tire needle,1 X Tire Pressure Gauge 30 X Self-Vulcanization Repair Plugs 4 X Black Extension Valves 8 X Plastic Valve Caps 8 X Chrome Hex Valve Capsps 8 X Standard Valve Cores 1 X 4-in-1 Valve Core Tool 1 X L-type Hex Tools,1 X Jar of lubricant 1 X Pliers,1 X Storage Bag,1 X instructions manual For all your tire repair needs 70pcs tire repair kit can fully meet your various tire repair needs. The kit includes T-handle and spiral probe, other accessories and 30 tapes. Widely used: for automobiles, trucks, jeeps, motorcycles, off-road vehicles, lawn mowers, tractors, trailers, etc High quality: This tyre repair kit is made of high-quality steel, which has excellent adhesion, flexibility, shock absorption, aging resistance and durability. Simple, convenient and solid: The kit has a color image description, which is easy to understand. It can repair a leaking tire in a few minutes. It is small and easy to carry. Details Pliers T-Handle Tools Tyre Tread Depth Gauge 30pcs Repair Plugs Step 1:Pull the nails out of the tyres. Step 2:Drilling with the Spiral Probe Tool. Step 3:Use the t-handle insert tool to feed a tire plug through the hole. Step 4:Insert the fork bit and the strip strip the same time. Step 5:Firmly pull up on the T-handle tool, leaving the strip in place. Step 6:Get rid of the excess.
